title: Alan Chen
compiled_truth: Alan Chen is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-08-21 to 2002-02-28), Alan Chen sent 7 and received 135 emails, totalling 142 interactions. Top correspondents: [Benjamin Rogers](people/benjamin-rogers) (5), [Madhup Kumar](people/madhup-kumar) (2), [Smith Day](people/smith-day) (2), [Clint Dean](people/clint-dean) (2), [Mpatterson](people/mpatterson-ercot) (1). Mailbox folders observed: trading_info.
